abilities.description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on another unit.Upgraded: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on units in an area.

translation.ru_description: Получите урон (50% макс. ОЗ), затем нанесите столько же и Страх 2 другому юниту.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите урон (50% макс. ОЗ), затем нанесите столько же и Страх 2 юнитам в области.
translation.en_description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on another unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on units in an area.

abilities.description: Take 1 damage and heal all allies 1 HP.Upgraded: Take 1 damage, heal all allies 1 HP and give them +1 mana.

translation.ru_description: Получите 1 урон, исцелите всех союзников на 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите 1 урон, исцелите союзников на 1 и дайте им +1 ману.
translation.en_description: Take 1 damage and heal all allies 1 HP.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Take 1 damage, heal all allies 1 HP and give them +1 mana.

abilities.description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. Upgraded: Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.

translation.ru_description:
Нанесите 1 урон и наложите эффект «Высасывание Жизни» 1.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Нанесите 2 урон и наложите эффект «Высасывание Жизни» 2.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

abilities.description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. Upgraded: Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.

translation.ru_description:
Нанесите 1 урон и наложите эффект «Высасывание Жизни» 1.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Нанесите 2 урон и наложите эффект «Высасывание Жизни» 2.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

abilities.description: Teleport to an open tile.Upgraded: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт на свободную клетку.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт. Если влетите в юнита — оба получаете 5 урона, он получает Страх.
translation.en_description: Teleport to an open tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

abilities.description: Teleport to an open tile.Upgraded: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт на свободную клетку.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт. Если влетите в юнита — оба получаете 5 урона, он получает Страх.
translation.en_description: Teleport to an open tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

abilities.description: Deal damage and inflict Weakness on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.Upgraded: Deal damage, inflict Weakness and Immobile on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

translation.ru_description: Урон и Слабость соседу. Если у вас нет оружия, экипируйте кость.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Урон, Слабость и Обездвиживание соседу. Если у вас нет оружия, экипируйте кость.
translation.en_description: Deal damage and inflict Weakness on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal damage, inflict Weakness and Immobile on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

abilities.description: Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage. Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up. Upgraded: Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage. Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.

translation.ru_description:
Исцелите юнита на 5, затем получите 10 урона.
[s:.7]Доступно, когда вы вырублены. Тогда без урона вам, а цели — Повышение Всех Хар-к.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Исцелите всех в области на 5, затем получите 10 урона.
[s:.7]Доступно, когда вы вырублены. Тогда без урона вам, а целям — Повышение Всех Хар-к.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

abilities.description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from an adjacent unit. Ignores shield.Upgraded: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from a unit in range 3. Ignores shield.

translation.ru_description: Потратьте всю ману, высосите столько же ОЗ у соседа. Игнор щита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Потратьте всю ману, высосите столько же ОЗ у цели в радиусе 3. Игнор щита.
translation.en_description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from an adjacent unit. Ignores shield.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from a unit in range 3. Ignores shield.

abilities.description: Drain 2 HP at melee range. This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp. Upgraded: Drain 2 HP at melee range. This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.

translation.ru_description:
Высосите 2 ОЗ вблизи.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили. При убийстве: воскресаете с 50% ОЗ.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Высосите 2 ОЗ вблизи.
[s:.7]Сильнее и доступно, когда вас вырубили. При убийстве: воскресаете с макс. ОЗ.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.[/s]

abilities.description: Deal 1 damage to all units.Upgraded: Deal 1 damage to all units. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Нанесите 1 урон всем юнитам.
translation.en_description: Deal 1 damage to all units.

abilities.description: Deal 1 damage to all units.Upgraded: Deal 1 damage to all units. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Нанесите 1 урон всем юнитам.
translation.en_description: Deal 1 damage to all units.

abilities.description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.Upgraded: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт в радиусе 1. Когда кто-то умирает, радиус растет на 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт в радиусе 1 (урон при посадке). Когда кто-то умирает, радиус и урон растут на 1.
translation.en_description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

abilities.description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.Upgraded: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт в радиусе 1. Когда кто-то умирает, радиус растет на 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт в радиусе 1 (урон при посадке). Когда кто-то умирает, радиус и урон растут на 1.
translation.en_description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

abilities.description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.Upgraded: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

translation.ru_description: Страх 1, Замешательство 2, Безумие 2 в конусе.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Страх 1, Замешательство 2, Безумие 2 и кража 2 ОЗ в конусе.
translation.en_description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

abilities.description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.Upgraded: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

translation.ru_description: Страх 1, Замешательство 2, Безумие 2 в конусе.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Страх 1, Замешательство 2, Безумие 2 и кража 2 ОЗ в конусе.
translation.en_description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

abilities.description: Deal 2 damage to yourself.

translation.ru_description: Нанесите себе 2 урона.
translation.en_description: Deal 2 damage to yourself.

abilities.description: Give a unit +1 Constitution and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 Constitution and lose 4 health.Upgraded: Give a unit +1 Constitution and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 Constitution and lose 4 health. This spell can revive units. If the unit revived was an enemy it gets charmed for the battle.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту +1 [img:con] и +4 ОЗ. Вы теряете 1 [img:con] и 4 ОЗ.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Дайте юниту +1 [img:con] и +4 ОЗ. Вы теряете 1 [img:con] и 4 ОЗ.
Может воскрешать. Воскрешенный враг будет очарован до конца битвы.
translation.en_description: Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.
This spell can revive units. If the unit revived was an enemy it gets charmed for the battle.

abilities.description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.Upgraded: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Заражение 1 на юнита в радиусе 3.
translation.en_description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.

abilities.description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.Upgraded: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Заражение 1 на юнита в радиусе 3.
translation.en_description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.
